name: developer-tools-pro
title: Developer Tools Pro
description: Browse and launch any of the 100+ tools in Developer Tools Pro from Raycast. Includes Quick Convert commands that pre-fill JSON Formatter, Base64 Encoder, URL Encoder/Decoder, and JWT Decoder with selected text or clipboard content.
author: aadhil_kh

commands.name: open-tool
commands.title: Search Tools
commands.description: Browse, pin, and launch any Developer Tools Pro tool

preferences.name: flutterAppPath
preferences.title: Flutter App Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the local Flutter project that contains `lib/features/shared/models/tool.dart`. Used by `npm run generate-tools` to refresh the tool index. Defaults to a sibling directory.
